tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_email_arrived_in_gmail_inbox
tests.trace:
def test_email_arrived_in_gmail_inbox():
        service = _gmail_service()
        address = _gmail_address()
        query = f"to:{address}"
    
        deadline = time.time() + 120
        while time.time() < deadline:
            response = (
                service.users()
                .messages()
                .list(userId="me", q=query, maxResults=5)
                .execute()
            )
            if response.get("messages"):
                return
            time.sleep(5)
    
>       pytest.fail(
            f"No email addressed to {address} arrived in the Gmail inbox within the timeout."
        )
E       Failed: No email addressed to codes.icy+receiver-zr-epjbmus@gmail.com arrived in the Gmail inbox within the timeout.

tests.message: The test failed in the call phase
